answers: Automation = using technology to perform tasks with minimal human intervention. Saves time, reduces errors, increases efficiency.
Tools: Zapier (connects apps), Make/Integromat (visual workflows), Python scripts, RPA tools (UiPath, Automation Anywhere).
Automate: email responses, data entry, report generation, file backups, social media posts, and repetitive workflows.
Start automating: identify repetitive tasks, map the workflow, choose the right tool, test thoroughly, then deploy.
